text:
The average person spends 1.5 YEARS on the toilet in their lifetime.

We built an app to make every second count. Track sessions, earn XP, compete in leagues, and find someone pooping at the same time as you.

Free. Zero data collected. No cap.

https://muhammadhamx.github.io/Royal-Throne/
image_text:
YOU WILL SPEND
1.5 YEARS
ON THE TOILET
image_subtext: We built an app for that.

text:
Nobody asked for a poop tracker.

We built one anyway.

It has XP, leagues, achievements, ML predictions, and a feature that matches you with someone else pooping at the same time.

Yes it's real. Yes it's free.

https://muhammadhamx.github.io/Royal-Throne/
image_subtext: We built it anyway.

text:
I'm a solo developer from Pakistan.
I have zero marketing budget.
I can't afford the $25 Play Store fee.

But I built an app with real-time multiplayer, ML predictions, full gamification, and WebSocket chat.

If you download it, you're literally my hero.

https://muhammadhamx.github.io/Royal-Throne/
image_subtext: By a broke dev from Pakistan who can't afford the Play Store

text:
Ancient Romans used communal toilets as social gathering places. They'd sit together and discuss politics, business, and gossip.

We're bringing that energy back with Poop Buddies. History repeats itself.

image_subtext: We brought that energy back. You're welcome.

text:
Open source poop tracker built with:

- React Native + Expo SDK 54
- Supabase (PostgreSQL + Realtime)
- Zustand state management
- Custom ML prediction engine
- WebSocket real-time chat

Star it. Fork it. Contribute.

https://github.com/muhammadhamx/Royal-Throne

Yaar Pakistani developer hoon. Budget zero hai. Play Store fee nahi de sakta.

Lekin app mein real-time multiplayer hai, ML predictions hain, gamification hai, chat hai.

Agar download karo toh mera din ban jaaye.

https://muhammadhamx.github.io/Royal-Throne/
image_subtext: Zero budget. Full features. Dil se free.
